query:
ALTER TABLE order_items 
ADD COLUMN grossWeight DECIMAL(10, 3) COMMENT '毛重（千克）',
ADD COLUMN netWeight DECIMAL(10, 3) COMMENT '净重（千克）',
ADD COLUMN cbm DECIMAL(10, 3) COMMENT '立方数（立方米）';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2Wfg8FxM46VuY92.2046134b715b --database 5QtmwQJEy7EFv8QJHVh9i8 --execute ALTER TABLE order_items 
ADD COLUMN grossWeight DECIMAL(10, 3) COMMENT '毛重（千克）',
ADD COLUMN netWeight DECIMAL(10, 3) COMMENT '净重（千克）',
ADD COLUMN cbm DECIMAL(10, 3) COMMENT '立方数（立方米）';
